rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b), while Educ. Code §21.418 governs teacher FMLA leave elections. The provisions address entirely unrelated subjects with no operative interaction.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district shall adopt a policy that provides a classroom teacher employed by the district the option to elect not to take the teacher's paid personal leave concurrently with unpaid leave the teacher is entitled to take under the Family and Medical Leave Act of 1993 (29 U.S.C. Section 2601 et seq.) for an absence due to pregnancy or the birth or adoption of a child.
_note: No conflict. The rule text addresses teacher leave policy and has no nexus to property tax homestead exemption amounts.
